Off Calendar Feb-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAFAL OFIERSKI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4244 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Petioner'S Depositon, And Notice Of Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Attorney, for respondent and moving party: The Civil Service Commison of the City and County of San Francisco and the City and County of San Francisco
Gregory Dillon, Esq., for Petitioner and opposing party: Dora Balcazar

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Respondent The Civil Service Commision of the City and County of San Francisco and The City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel petitioner's deposition is granted.
By granting the motion the Court makes no ruling as to whether the petition is properly brought pursuant to CCP Section 1094.5. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
